normalized.subject: 💌 I sat down with Greg Isenberg and gave a full course on agents
normalized.snippet: Plus my youtube thumbnail creation skill, two new ways to talk to Claude from your phone, and the 6 MCPs I use every day. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
normalized.bodyText:
----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/cae2b512-97be-48f5-b7b2-d3f2b4c644a7/ai-with-remy-logo.gif?t=1769570014)
Caption: 



Bonjour mes amis,

My weeks somehow get crazier and crazier, and we’ve really outdone ourselves this week.

I recorded the best FREE course on AI agents with Greg Isenberg + lots more, lets get into it shall we..




----------———————————————————————————

----------
## 📌 TL;DR

* **I did a pod with Greg Isenberg** → Sat down with the biggest startup podcast to give everyone a full course on AI agents. Go watch it.

* **Anthropic shipped Dispatch and Channels** → Two new ways to talk to Claude remotely from your phone. Channels is the Claude Code equivalent via Telegram or Discord.

* **Builder's Notes** → My honest take on where things are at. Plus a breakdown of my /youtube-publish-workflow skill that creates youtube thumbnails.

* **My top 6 MCPs** → The exact MCP setup I use every day.

* **Also this week** → GPT-5.4 mini and nano, Mistral Small 4, Midjourney V8, MiniMax M2.7, and Lovable trying to be everything to everyone.




----------———————————————————————————

----------
## I did a pod with Greg Isenberg



Bit of a surreal one this week.

I did an episode with [Greg Isenberg](https://www.youtube.com/@GregIsenberg) on The Startup Ideas Podcast - probably ==the ====biggest podcast in the AI & startup space right now==.

I've been watching Greg for about 12 months. All of a sudden, there I was sitting across from him. Wild. He's an amazing bloke and exactly how he comes across in the videos.

I wanted to make this ==a full course on agents.== Where things are at, how they work, and how you can start building your own. Because most founders are still just messaging chat models; asking questions, getting answers. The ones who start using agents to actually delegate real work are going to ==pull so far ahead== that catching up becomes really hard.

No matter what level you're at, there's something in here for you. Give it a watch.

This was a ==massive milestone for me.== Really appreciate all the positive feedback in the comments. Means a lot.



Youtube: Building AI Agents that actually work (Full Course) (https://youtu.be/eA9Zf2-qYYM?si=7I7Ge2C6RuW6VGyq)


----------———————————————————————————

----------
## Delegate tasks to Claude Cowork from your phone



Anthropic had a massive week. ==1M token context is now just the default== across Opus and Sonnet (Claude’s main AI models). Your context window is basically how much your AI can hold in its head in one chat without it losing the plot.

Anthropic also ==launched Dispatch.== [Dispatch](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/13947068-assign-tasks-to-claude-from-anywhere-in-cowork) creates one persistent conversation between the Claude mobile app on your phone and the Claude Desktop app on your computer.

It's not Claude Cowork on your phone. Your phone is the messaging interface. Your computer is the engine. Everything Claude does, every file it reads, every connector it accesses, every skill it loads, happens on your desktop. ==Your phone just sends the instructions and receives the results.==

Think of it as ==a walkie-talkie to a computer that's already running.== A remote control if you will.

It covers ==90% of what I was using OpenClaw for==, but feels far less likely to upload my entire drive to a malware site.

[Felix Rieseberg ](https://x.com/felixrieseberg)also announced that ==Dispatch can now ====launch Claude Code sessions==, using the same underlying tech as its remote control feature. So the direction is clear. AI agents running on your computer, doing real work, while you ==delegate from wherever you are.==

Now, Anthropic are known for shipping features early to gather feedback fast. Dispatch certainly ==has some rough edges and some things don't work amazingly==, but the core is solid. It's early software, so set your expectations.

But "early" in the Claude ecosystem tends to mean "transformative within 60 days." Cowork itself went from rough preview to daily workhorse in under eight weeks.



**Things to note:**

* Your existing Cowork skills, context files, and connectors all carry over automatically

* Pre-configure Gmail, Slack, Notion connectors on desktop first, Dispatch inherits them

* Dispatch doesn't read your CLAUDE.md unless you tell it to. Either include "read CLAUDE.md" in your message, or add a line in your global instructions to always find and read CLAUDE.md when sent a task via Dispatch. I assume this will be fixed very soon

* No notifications when tasks finish, you have to check manually

* One thread only, no way to manage multiple conversations

* "Keep awake" must be toggled on in your Claude Desktop app or Dispatch dies when your Mac sleeps

* No file picker on mobile, describe the folder p

End-to-end professional work: reads reports, builds revenue models, produces deliverable Word/Excel/PPT documents with multi-round high-fidelity editing. GDPval-AA ELO score 1495. normalized.subject: Introducing Cat Labs
normalized.bodyText:
## Watch the announcement video

Instagram: (https://www.instagram.com/p/DWB5dmUgi84/)

Last summer I posted a [video](https://www.instagram.com/p/DMmJyHkusSY/) of a bluetooth landline phone I had made to my audience of ~1M on TikTok and Instagram. Within 3 days, I had over 1,000 pre-orders. By the end of the year—in about 5 months—I had found a manufacturer, hired a small team, and sold over $750,000 worth of bluetooth landline phones. 

[Physical Phones](https://physicalphones.com/) moved that fast because of two things working together:

**(1) Creator distribution.** I had a built-in audience that trusted me, gave me direct feedback, and pre-ordered before I'd committed to manufacturing. I understood exactly what they wanted, which de-risked the entire experiment.

**(2) AI tooling.** My small team used AI to teach ourselves FCC approval processes, debug hardware issues, translate technical documents from Mandarin, negotiate with suppliers, and about 1,000 other things that would have required specialists or months of trial and error.

Those two forces—creator communities and AI leverage—are an explosive combination that changes the economics of building companies. Small teams can now move faster than venture-backed startups with 50 people and 18-month roadmaps.

So why stop at phones? :)

**Today, I'm announcing ****[Cat Labs](https://catlabs.studio/)**** — a creator-first product studio where the audience decides what gets made.**

Starting this summer, we're launching one new experiment every month. Hardware, software, weird ideas, useful tools—whatever we think will work. Some will become real businesses. Some will fail publicly. All of them will be available for you to buy, test, or play with.

And we're showing you everything. Not vague "behind the scenes" content, but the actual work:

* The AI prompts we use to debug firmware and write supplier emails

* Real-time negotiations with manufacturers

* The spreadsheets, the pivots, the moments we decide to kill a product or double down

* Revenue numbers, costs, margins—the full financial picture

You'll also have a say. We'll poll the community on what to build next. You'll vote on whether we pivot or ship. Your feedback will shape what gets made.

If you're a creator, you'll get a working playbook for turning your audience into customers. If you're building something, you'll see whether AI tools actually deliver or if it's all hype. If you're just curious about the future of work, you'll watch us test it in public, repeatedly, and prove what's possible when you stop waiting for permission.

**Here's what I believe:** The future feels uncertain because people are being _told_ about AI instead of being _shown_ what you can do with it. I think if more people saw what I did with Physical Phones—the autonomy, the creative freedom, the fact that a small team can now build things that used to require venture backing—they'd feel less anxious and more excited.

If you want to follow along, make sure you’re subscribed to the official [Cat Labs Newsletter](https://catgptnewsletter.beehiiv.com/subscribe), and follow CatGPT on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/askcatgpt), [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@askcatgpt), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherinegoetze/), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@askcatgpt).

If you want to build with us—as a creator, collaborator, or investor—reach out here: [https://catlabs.studio/](https://catlabs.studio/)

More to come… 🚀🌈

**_Cat_**


———

https://catgptnewsletter.beehiiv.com/p/introducing-cat-labs

normalized.bodyText:
Your Notion workspace is ready to explore as an interactive 3D graph. Get started in 60 seconds.

IVGraph https://ivgraph.com ●  Beta is Live Hi Adam Rudavský, Remember signing up for the IVGraph beta? We’ve been building it all this time, and now it’s ready for you. IVGraph turns your Notion workspace into an interactive 3D graph — like graph view in Obsidian, but for Notion and in three dimensions.

What already works:

🔗  One-click Notion connection via OAuth 🏰  3D force-directed graph of all your pages 🔍  Full-text search across your workspace 🎨  Customizable colors, node sizes, and graph physics 📸  Page cover photos and emojis as node icons 🕶️  Privacy Mode — hide note titles for screenshots 🎭  Style editor — customize how nodes, databases, and linked notes are displayed 📱  AR mode on mobile devices (experimental)


Get started in 60 seconds:

1 Go to ivgraph.com https://ivgraph.com → Create Account 2 Click “Connect Notion” → confirm access 3 Your graph will appear after a quick sync

Launch IVGraph → https://ivgraph.com

Good to know: Sync. After your first login, syncing takes from one to several minutes depending on workspace size. Make sure you grant access to all the databases you want to see in the graph. If you add access to new databases after the first sync — do a Full Refresh. Due to the Notion API specifics, recently created or edited documents may not appear immediately and can take a few minutes. Performance. The graph has been tested and works best with up to ~2,000 nodes. Larger workspaces may experience rendering issues. Enabling icons with a large number of nodes may cause freezes. Note content. Not synced yet — the feature exists, but the Notion API is very slow and loading content causes significant delays. Mobile. Graph rendering on mobile is a secondary priority and may have issues. Images. About 3–5% of Notion page icons and covers may fail to load — Notion regularly regenerates image links, and some become stale during sync. A re-sync usually fixes this. Multiple workspaces. You can already connect multiple Notion workspaces — the feature is available but needs additional testing. Referral system and API are available for testing but not fully polished yet. Account deletion. In the Profile tab you can delete your account — all personal information and data about your notes will be removed. If something isn’t working — try logging out/in and doing a Full Refresh. In some cases you may need to delete your account and re-register. Important: We take data security very seriously, but since this is a beta, we strongly recommend granting access only to data you’re comfortable using for testing. By using the service, you accept all associated risks.

This is a real beta — and this is where you can help. Send us:

🐛  Bugs, weird behavior, sync or display issues — ideally with screenshots or video 💬  Impressions, feedback, expectations — positive or negative 💡  Feature requests and ideas

Every piece of feedback matters. Just reply to this email or use the support chat.

Support the project: Share a screenshot or video of your graph on social media with a link to ivgraph.com https://ivgraph.com — that’s the best support. Privacy Mode will help hide your note contents. ☕  Support on Ko-fi https://ko-fi.com/I3I41PLSK4 The project needs support right now, and even a coffee tip gives us faith in what we’re building.

Get in touch:

✉  support@ivgraph.com 💬  Support chat on ivgraph.com https://ivgraph.com ✈  Telegram: @ivgraph https://t.me/ivgraph ▶  YouTube: @IVGraph https://youtube.com/@IVGraph 💼  LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/company/ivgraph/ 📘  Facebook https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61586977872528



You received this email because you signed up for the IVGraph beta.

ivgraph.com https://ivgraph.com

normalized.bodyText:
https://expandeco.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=722268c129ef92d96964285c9&id=435b4a5bdd&e=4df84d808c

Dobrý deň,

pri vstupe na nové zahraničné trhy riešite stovky vecí: logistiku, marketing, zákaznícky servis, ... Posledná vec, na ktorú chcete myslieť, je sledovanie legislatívnych zmien v Nemecku, Česku alebo Taliansku.

Pravda je však neúprosná – obchodné podmienky sú jedným z prvých dokumentov, na ktoré sa kontrolné orgány zameriavajú.

V Expandeco sme sa preto rozhodli túto záťaž z vašich ramien raz a navždy vziať. Spolu s expertmi z Ecommerce Legal a Marcinom Tomczakom prinášame službu, ktorá mení pravidlá hry:



** Automaticky aktualizované VOP ⚖️
------------------------------------------------------------

Prečo je to pre váš e-shop dôležité?

👉 Žiadny stres z legislatívy – predpisy sa menia, no vaše VOP sa aktualizujú automaticky.
👉 Úspora času aj nákladov – koniec drahých právnych konzultácií pri každej legislatívnej zmene.
👉 Bezpečnosť a dôveryhodnosť – váš e-shop je vždy v súlade s lokálnou legislatívou a pôsobí profesionálne.


**
------------------------------------------------------------


** 🎁 ŠPECIÁLNA PONUKA NA ŠTART
------------------------------------------------------------

Máme pre vás bonus. Pre prvých 10 e-shopov, ktoré sa pre túto službu rozhodnú, ponúkame zľavu 20%.

Odporúčame preto nečakať príliš dlho s rozhodovaním.
☑️ Chcem vedieť viac a získať zľavu (https://expandeco.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=722268c129ef92d96964285c9&id=58014c953e&e=4df84d808c)

Nedovoľte, aby legislatívne chyby brzdili váš medzinárodný rast.

My sa postaráme o paragrafy – vy sa môžete sústrediť na škálovanie vášho e-shopu.


** Andrea Stanko

normalized.subject: Sprístupnenie oprávnenia pre osobné konanie na PFS s daňovým úradom
normalized.snippet: Vážený klient, na základe Vašej požiadavky na sprístupnenie oprávnenia pre osobné konanie s daňovým úradom na portáli finančnej správy, sme Vám pridelili prístup pre osobné konanie za subjekt Adam
normalized.bodyText:
Sprístupnenie oprávnenia pre osobné konanie na PFS s daňovým úradom
Vážený klient,
na základe Vašej požiadavky na sprístupnenie oprávnenia pre osobné konanie s daňovým úradom na portáli finančnej správy, sme Vám pridelili prístup pre osobné konanie za subjekt Adam Rudavský .
 Pre elektronickú komunikáciu s finančnou správou je potrebné, aby ste boli držiteľom kvalifikovaného certifikátu, ktorý je nevyhnutný na podpisovanie podávaných elektronických dokumentov.
 V prípade, že chcete finančnej správe doručovať elektronické dokumenty, ktoré nebudú podpísané kvalifikovaným elektronickým podpisom, je potrebné uzatvoriť s daňovým úradom písomnú dohodu o elektronickom doručovaní podľa §13 ods. 5 zákona č. 563/2009 Z. z. v znení neskorších predpisov.
 Dohoda pre DAŇOVÉ ÚRADY
Viac informácií k elektronickej komunikácii nájdete na portáli finančnej správy .
 Finančné riaditeľstvo SR
tel.: +421-48-43 17 222
web:
 https://www.financnasprava.sk/sk/kontakt
